name: use-async
description: Run an async function and get a fully typed AsyncState<T> back — including the retry callback — so you never assemble the union by hand.

intents: turn a fetch into a typed AsyncState
run an async function in a component with loading and error states
examples:
const users = useAsync(() => api.users.list(), []);
<DataList state={users.state} label="Users" getKey={(u) => u.id}>{(u) => <UserRow user={u} />}</DataList>
